Lo recomiendo.

I recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Los baños re sucios. Se lo comenté al playero, quien me dijo:ah! Si!! Tenes que ir a los de adentro, bueno, no lo sabía, por algo están los de afuera.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were filthy. I mentioned it to the attendant, who said: "Oh! Yes!! You have to use the ones inside." Well, I didn't know that; there's a reason the ones outside are there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtMDQ2QktREAE

reviews.comment:
Baños excelentes,muy buena atención tanto de los playeros como de el muchacho de la tienda,muy cordiales,Buen servicio en general lastima el mal momento que le hicieron pasar a el empleado de la tienda insultandolo un caballero
muy desubicado con su esposa por tener otro horario pegado en la puerta de entrada.
Sin Dudas
volveremos las próximas vacasiones

(Translated by Google)
Excellent bathrooms, very good service from both the beach attendants and the store employee, very friendly. Overall, it's a shame the store employee had a bad time when a gentleman insulted him.
He was very rude to his wife for having a different schedule posted on the front door.
We will definitely be back next vacation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtMC1Lcm9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
La higiene de los sanitarios deficiente. No tienen disponible lo que ofrecen (no funciona la tostadora de sándwich), no hay vasos para las bebidas. Tampoco cargan los puntos de YPF Serviclub. Desastroso todo.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are unhygienic. They don't have what they advertise (the sandwich toaster doesn't work), there are no cups for drinks, and they don't reload YPF Serviclub points. The whole thing is a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdmNEd2RREAE
